name: codemonster-ru/annabel-monorepo
description: Annabel framework and Codemonster PHP ecosystem monorepo

scripts.validate:packages: composer validate --strict && for dir in packages/* skeleton/annabel-skeleton applications/annabel-cms; do if [ -f "$dir/composer.json" ]; then composer validate --strict --no-check-lock --working-dir="$dir"; fi; done
scripts.test:packages: set -e; for dir in packages/*; do if [ -f "$dir/phpunit.xml.dist" ]; then composer test --working-dir="$dir"; fi; done
scripts.install:cms: COMPOSER=composer.dev.json composer update --working-dir=applications/annabel-cms --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-progress && npm ci --prefix applications/annabel-cms
scripts.analyse:packages: set -e; for dir in packages/*; do if composer run-script --list --working-dir="$dir" | grep -q '^  analyse '; then composer analyse --working-dir="$dir"; fi; if composer run-script --list --working-dir="$dir" | grep -q '^  psalm '; then composer psalm --working-dir="$dir"; fi; done
scripts.audit:packages: set -e; for dir in packages/* skeleton/annabel-skeleton; do if [ -f "$dir/composer.lock" ]; then composer audit --working-dir="$dir"; fi; done
